title: glandularia × hybrida
intro: Glandularia × hybrida, also known as Verbena × hybrida, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbena family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and adaptable growth habits. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Glandularia × hybrida include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties, making it a popular natural remedy. Glandularia × hybrida is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in essential oil form for its therapeutic properties.
